title: gethealthreturnsokstatus
description: Verify that GET /health returns HTTP 200 with body {status: 'ok'} when the service is healthy.

title: postapiparticipantscreatesparticipant
description: Verify that POST /api/participants with valid name and email creates a new participant and returns HTTP 201 with participant object including id, name, email, and createdAt.

title: postapiparticipantsvalidatesinput
description: Verify that POST /api/participants with missing required fields (e.g., missing email) returns HTTP 400 with a validation error response.

title: postapiparticipantsrejectsduplicateemail
description: Verify that POST /api/participants with an email that already exists returns HTTP 409 with an error message indicating duplicate email.

title: postapiworkshopscreatesworkshop
description: Verify that POST /api/workshops with valid title, description, capacity, and scheduledAt creates a new workshop and returns HTTP 201 with workshop object including id, title, description, capacity, scheduledAt, and createdAt.

title: postapiworkshopsvalidatesinput
description: Verify that POST /api/workshops with missing or malformed fields (e.g., missing scheduledAt or invalid date format) returns HTTP 400 with a validation error response.

title: postapiworkshopsrejectsinvalidbusinessdata
description: Verify that POST /api/workshops with business-invalid data such as capacity less than 1 or scheduling conflicts returns HTTP 422 with an error response.

title: getapiworkshopsidretrievesdetails
description: Verify that GET /api/workshops/:id with a valid existing workshop id returns HTTP 200 with workshop details including enrollment summary and attendee list.

title: getapiworkshopsidnotfound
description: Verify that GET /api/workshops/:id with a non-existent workshop id returns HTTP 404 with an error response.

title: postapienrollmentscreatesenrollment
description: Verify that POST /api/enrollments with valid participantId and workshopId enrolls the participant. If workshop capacity is available, returns HTTP 201 with enrollment status CONFIRMED; if full, returns status WAITLIST.
